title: T-014 — Seed fefo_strategy_v1 DSL rule (WH §9.1, §9.2, ADR-029)
prompt:
# T-014 — Seed fefo_strategy_v1 DSL rule (WH §9.1, §9.2, ADR-029)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §9.1, §9.2, ADR-029
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Seed `fefo_strategy_v1` rule encoding §9.2 FEFO query (ORDER BY expiry_date ASC NULLS LAST, created_at ASC tiebreaker, qa_status IN ('PASSED','RELEASED'), status='available').

## Implementation contract
1. Seed `packages/db/src/seeds/fefo-strategy-v1.ts` upserting rule_id='fefo_strategy_v1', kind='pick_strategy', payload (JSON: filter clauses + sort spec + qa_status whitelist + tiebreaker).
2. Helper `runPickStrategy(rule_id, inputs): PickSuggestion[]` reads payload and constructs the Drizzle query in T-030.
3. Version 1.0; admin read-only per ADR-029.

## Files
- packages/db/seed/rules/fefo-strategy-v1.json [create]
- packages/db/seed/rules/fefo-strategy-v1.seed.ts [create]
- packages/db/seed/rules/__tests__/fefo-strategy-v1.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the seed runs, when rule_registry is queried for `rule_id='fefo_strategy_v1'`, then it returns exactly one row with version=1 and payload including the §9.2 sort spec.
2. Given the rule payload is loaded, when inspected, then `qa_status_whitelist=['PASSED','RELEASED']` and `sort=[{col:'expiry_date',dir:'asc',nulls:'last'},{col:'created_at',dir:'asc'}]`.

## Test strategy
- RED: `packages/db/src/seeds/__tests__/fefo-strategy-v1.test.ts` asserting payload shape + helper-driven query plan.
- Run `pnpm --filter db test fefo-strategy-v1`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not hardcode FEFO query in T-030 — it must read from this rule.
- Do not omit `nulls last` on expiry_date (LPs without expiry must rank lowest).

## Dependencies
- T-002
